title: Get your weather: telephone services - Canada.ca
content:
## Get your weather: telephone services
Thanks to modern technology, the most up-to-date weather information is just a phone call away. Environment Canada’s telephone weather services allow Canadians to get their weather almost anywhere there is a cellphone signal or a land line.
Environment Canada offers a free automated recording of current conditions, forecasts and warnings for many communities in your local calling area.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
